pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version to 3.3.13 to align with the Java 21 migration and Spring Boot 3.3 requirements.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.1.x does not fully support Java 21 as a baseline and lacks features/fixes required for the target environment; upgrading is necessary for compatibility.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Java version properties to 21 to compile and run on JDK 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project compiles for Java 17, which may not be the intended target runtime and prevents using Java 21 features.

pom.xml.general_idea: Remove explicit version from ojdbc8 dependency to let Spring Boot BOM manage it.
Upgrade Lombok to 1.18.46 for compatibility with newer tooling and Java 21.
Remove explicit version from jackson-dataformat-xml to let Spring Boot BOM manage it.
Upgrade springdoc-openapi-starter-webmvc-ui to 2.6.0 for compatibility with Spring Boot 3.3.
Upgrade spring-boot-maven-plugin to 3.3.13 to match the Spring Boot parent version.
pom.xml.why_exists: Mismatched plugin and parent versions can cause build failures or incorrect packaging behavior.
